focus: correctness deeper on test coverage for seeded-PPR, includeTrace, flag-off behavior, and edge cases

findingsNew.title: Focused PPR regression tests miss the two active P1 failure modes
findingsNew.claim: The focused seeded-PPR vitest coverage asserts flag-off behavior, flag-on ordering, confidence weighting, and iteration caps, but it does not exercise the missing compiled weighted-walk artifact path from P1-001 or flagged impact with includeTrace enabled over a multi-hop graph from P1-002.
findingsNew.counterevidenceSought: Read the four focused vitest files line by line; searched mcp_server/tests for includeTrace, why_included, edgeChain, dist/lib/graph, bfs-traversal, deadline, duplicate, malformed, and SPECKIT_CODE_GRAPH_SEEDED_PPR_RANKING; checked the compiled bfs-traversal.js artifact path with Glob.
findingsNew.alternativeExplanation: Existing context-handler tests do cover single-hop includeTrace and same-depth duplicate breadcrumbs, but they do not enter the flagged seeded-PPR impact branch; existing PPR tests may pass in environments where the dist artifact happens to exist, but they do not assert behavior when it is absent.
findingsNew.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade if a focused test is added or found that runs flagged impact with includeTrace over a multi-hop PPR graph and separately simulates or guards absent Memory MCP dist artifact loading.

findingDetails.title: Focused PPR regression tests miss the two active P1 failure modes
findingDetails.scopeProof: Targeted search for includeTrace, why_included, edgeChain, dist/lib/graph, bfs-traversal, deadline, duplicate, malformed, and SPECKIT_CODE_GRAPH_SEEDED_PPR_RANKING across mcp_server/tests/*.vitest.ts found includeTrace coverage in code-graph-context-handler.vitest.ts, but not on the flagged seeded-PPR impact branch.
affectedSurfaceHints: deadline and duplicate PPR edge cases

spec_code.notes: Focused tests cover confidence differentiation and seeded-PPR ranking, but not active module-load and multi-hop provenance failure modes.

checklist_evidence.notes: P1-003 remains active; this iteration did not re-adjudicate packet completion-state drift.

feature_catalog_code.notes: Inherited P2-005; not re-reviewed this iteration.

playbook_capability.notes: Inherited P2-005; not re-reviewed this iteration.

notes: includeTrace exists only outside the flagged seeded-PPR impact path; absent-dist import scenario has no focused test guard.
